articles.title: All Unreleased GTA Online The Kortz Center Heist Vehicles And Prices - RockstarINTEL
articles.description: All of the currently unreleased vehicles part of the GTA Online The Kortz Center Heist update have been revealed by community member @NeedForMadnessA. Be sure to give them a follow for all of their work. We also can show you images of them plus their prices h…

articles.title: Google Pixel Watch Fitbit Sensor Permission Bug Leaves Health Tracking Broken for Some Users - Techgenyz
articles.description: The Google Pixel Fitbit sensor permission bug locks users out of Google Health apps by demanding sensor access already granted. Even factory resets do not fix it.

articles.title: Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Raid Make-Up Event - Pokémon GO Hub
articles.description: During Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global certain areas experienced issues with raids. This led to Scopely Explore turning off Team GO Rocket to help the event run smoother. Trainers experienced technical issues when attempting to join raid battles that led to them…

articles.title: New rumours suggest Nintendo could be looking into upgrading the Switch 2 with an OLED screen - Eurogamer.net
articles.description: It's been claimed serious talks about upgrading the Switch 2 with an OLED screen are underway at Nintendo, but nothing has been decided yet.

articles.title: New leak reportedly reveals nearly full spec sheet for Samsung Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 - Mashable
articles.description: Ahead of a July 22 Unpacked event, a new report details battery upgrades, chip changes, and pricing for Samsung's next smartwatches.

articles.title: More deleted Pixel 11 Amazon listings reveal full US pricing and specs - Android Authority
articles.description: Now deleted Amazon.com listings for the Pixel 11 lineup have revealed almost everything about the phones, including the US pricing and specs.
